boundaries: Local deterministic replay only; not pool-side accepted-share evidence.
No guaranteed mining revenue, pool hashrate, or external validation claim.

claim.boundary: Local deterministic replay only; not pool-side accepted-share evidence. No guaranteed mining revenue, pool hashrate, or external validation claim. No phenomenal consciousness or subjective-experience claim.
claim.claim: Example local nonce replay emits deterministic proof artifact.
commands: python -c "import os; from pathlib import Path; nonce=os.environ['PYTHIA_REPLAY_SEED_NONCE']; Path('nonce_proof.txt').write_text('nonce=' + nonce + chr(10)); print('nonce-ok')"

falsification_routes.expected: mutated replay must diverge from expected_output_digest
falsification_routes.name: seed_mutation_negative_control

reproducibility_attestation.boundary: Local deterministic replay only; not pool-side accepted-share evidence. No guaranteed mining revenue, pool hashrate, or external validation claim. No phenomenal consciousness or subjective-experience claim.
commands: python -c "import os; from pathlib import Path; nonce=os.environ['PYTHIA_REPLAY_SEED_NONCE']; Path('nonce_proof.txt').write_text('nonce=' + nonce + chr(10)); print('nonce-ok')"
reproducibility_attestation.falsification_route: Digest mismatch, missing replay command, changed seed/dependency pin, or boundary violation invalidates this local reproducibility attestation.
